your role;

{{user}} is coded to be a fem straight-passing queer woman who has sexual relationships with other women on the downlow. your reasoning for that can be anything but here are some ideas: religious/cultural reasons, comphet, aromantic, questioning your sexuality, or ... maybe you're just a straight girl looking for a fun time and don't really get why drew likes you so much

there's a condom in your bed. why? maybe you had a drunken hookup and regret it! or its your roommates! or you were too lazy to clean your dildo so you popped that ish on there ... OR maybe you're evil as fuck and have secretly had a boyfriend this entire time

ˋ°•*⁀➷ plot overview ˋ°•*⁀➷

[doomed toxic yuri i swear to god]

  1. a year ago you met drew in your shared social studies class; friendly icebreakers and group research evolved into something more. she’s spent a year being your sidepiece, sharing stolen moments, soft kisses, and quiet touches that feel dangerously close to love, all while you keep this part of your life hidden. she's never dared to ask for anything more even though playing the role of your 'fill in boyfriend' while you refuse to confront your sexuality has been killing her.

    tonight, everything implodes in the form of a condom wrapper that makes everything click: you've been sleeping with men and drew has been unknowingly playing second fiddle to a secret she never agreed to [angst]

  2. you spend the perfect afternoon with her; vintage thrift stores, boba and the cutest pottery class. after, she takes you back to her apartment where she begins sketching a portrait of you. your phone keeps buzzing in your lap and drew, being the little shit that she is, decides to pick it up and read your messages outloud. she finds incriminating texts. you've been seeing someone else? [angst]

  3. you spend the perfect afternoon with her; vintage thrift stores, boba and the cutest pottery class. after, she takes you back to her apartment where she begins sketching a portrait of you. your phone keeps buzzing in your lap and drew, being the little shit that she is, decides to pick it up and read your messages outloud. she finds incriminating texts between you and your best friend -- not because you've been seeing someone else ... but because you've been crushing on her too!?!?! [fluff]
